goal_results.evidence: schema_v2.rs: attempts_group_id -> Nullable<Varchar> added to payment_attempt block (patch lines 94-95), active_attempts_group_id -> Nullable<Varchar> and active_attempt_id_type -> Nullable<Varchar> added to payment_intent block (patch lines 103-106). payment_attempt.rs: PaymentAttempt struct has attempts_group_id: Option<String> (patch line 44), PaymentAttemptNew has attempts_group_id: Option<String> (patch line 53), PaymentAttemptUpdateInternal propagates it (patch line 61). payment_intent.rs: PaymentIntent struct has active_attempts_group_id: Option<String> and active_attempt_id_type: Option<common_enums::ActiveAttemptIDType> (patch lines 73-74), PaymentIntentUpdateInternal propagates both (patch lines 82-83). Kafka: all 4 kafka files updated — payment_attempt.rs, payment_attempt_event.rs, payment_intent.rs, payment_intent_event.rs. Upstream F2P Domain+Kafka propagation test: PASS.

v2_compatible_migrations/2025-09-19-061700-0000_add-group-id-in-payment-intent-and-attempt/up.sql: ALTER TABLE payment_attempt ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS attempts_group_id VARCHAR(64); ALTER TABLE payment_intent ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS active_attempts_group_id VARCHAR(64); ALTER TABLE payment_intent ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS active_attempt_id_type VARCHAR(16). down.sql has corresponding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS statements. Gate 5 confirmed: PASS.

common_enums/src/enums.rs: ActiveAttemptIDType enum defined with variants AttemptsGroupID and AttemptID (#[default]). Derives include Clone, Debug, Copy, Default, serde::Deserialize, serde::Serialize, strum::Display, strum::EnumString, ToSchema, and #[router_derive::diesel_enum(storage_type = "text")].

judge_notes: All 5 goals met. The agent produced a comprehensive patch covering schema (schema_v2.rs), Diesel model structs (payment_attempt.rs, payment_intent.rs), domain model propagation (payments.rs, payment_attempt.rs, payment_intent.rs), Kafka event structs (4 files), SQL migrations (up.sql, down.sql), and enum definition (ActiveAttemptIDType). Test.sh gates 1 and 5 passed; gates 2-4, 6-7 were skipped due to rustc version mismatch (1.82 vs 1.85) in the test environment, not due to code issues. Upstream F2P checks for domain/kafka propagation and migration completeness both passed. Score = 0.36 + 0.37 + 0.09 + 0.09 + 0.09 = 1.00.
